title: Project Name & Identity
document: The project is named PRAANGAN Elitus. It is an ultra-luxury residential development featuring 2 magnificent towers.

title: Developer & Architect
document: Developed by Praangan Infrastructure. Architecture, landscape, and interior design are managed by GEOMETRIK CONSULTANTS LLP.

title: Luxury Positioning
document: Designed for elite living with a Minimal Monumental Masterpiece style and internationally styled building architecture.

title: Low Density Planning
document: Intentionally developed with low density and a low Built-up to Land Area ratio for enhanced privacy and openness.

title: Podium Amenities
document: Features a massive 68,000 Sq. Ft. exclusive podium floor dedicated to club-class amenities.

title: Exact Address
document: Located Near Dehgam Circle, Opposite Bilasiya Bus Stop, Naroda Dehgam Road, Ahmedabad. Sits on a 198 Ft. Wide State Highway.

title: Airport Connectivity
document: The International Airport is approximately 16 minutes away from the project.

title: Railway Station
document: The Railway Station is approximately 22 minutes away from the project.

title: SP Ring Road
document: S.P. Ring Road is just 1 minute away from the project, ensuring excellent connectivity.

title: Nearby Hospitals
document: Akshar Hospital (5 min), Life Care Hospital (6 min), Shalby Hospital (8 min), and Ananta Hospital (12 min).

title: Nearby Schools
document: The South International School (10 min), S.P. Genesis School (10 min), Devasya International School (10 min), and R.P. Vasani International School (15 min).

title: Shopping & Entertainment
document: Cineworld (2 min), Dmart (4 min), Miraj Cinema (5 min), Mango Cinema (10 min). Narendra Modi Stadium is 20 mins away.

title: 4 BHK Configuration
document: Spacious 4 BHK Ultra Luxurious Apartments. Super Built-up Area: 5,562 sq. ft. Approx Carpet Area: 3,200 sq. ft.

title: 5 BHK Configuration
document: Premium 5 BHK Ultra Luxurious Apartments. Super Built-up Area: 6,840 sq. ft. Approx Carpet Area: 4,200 sq. ft.

title: Total Units
document: The project consists of a total of 128 flats spread across 2 residential blocks (Block A and Block B).

title: Tower Separation
document: Boasts the highest margin of 135 ft between both blocks for maximum privacy and ventilation.

title: Private Lift Foyer
document: Each floor features an approx 85 ft long & 15 ft wide lavish lift foyer. 4 access-controlled elevators open directly into personal corridors.

title: No Common Walls
document: Absolutely no common walls between any units, ensuring complete acoustic and visual privacy.

title: Floor Height
document: Offers an impressive 11 Ft Floor-to-Floor height for a grand spatial experience.

title: Balcony Design
document: Master bedrooms feature large cantilevered overhanging balconies. Living areas feature cantilevered sky decks with panoramic views.

title: Servant Quarter
document: Each unit includes a staff quarter with an en-suite toilet, separate entry connected to the wash yard and kitchen.

title: Wash Yard & Dry Balcony
document: 4 BHK Dry Balcony: 10'2" X 7'5". 5 BHK Dry Balcony: 12'4" X 7'0". Dedicated space for AC outdoor units.

title: Puja Space
document: 4 BHK Puja Room: 6'0" X 5'3". 5 BHK Puja Room: 6'8" X 4'0". Dedicated spiritual space in all units.

title: Living Room Dimensions
document: 4 BHK Living Room: 23'9" X 20'10". 5 BHK Living Room: 26'0" X 23'10". Spacious family and dining zones.

title: Kitchen & Store
document: 4 BHK Kitchen: 11'0" X 13'4". 5 BHK Kitchen: 12'7" X 13'4". Attached store rooms included (4 BHK: 6'8"X5'7", 5 BHK: 6'8"X6'0").

title: Bedroom Configuration
document: 4 BHK has 2 Master Bedrooms + 2 En-suite Bedrooms. 5 BHK has 3 Master Bedrooms + 2 En-suite Bedrooms. All bedrooms are en-suite.

title: Gym & Yoga
document: Well-equipped gym, Zumba & Dance Studio, and a Yoga & Meditation Area surrounded by calming waters.

title: Jogging & Reflexology
document: Approx 400 Meters long walkway/jogging track combined with a reflexology path for holistic wellness.

title: Swimming Pools
document: Features a splash pool and a shallow swimming pool located on the 68,000 sq. ft. amenities floor.

title: Sports Courts
document: Includes Pickle Ball Court, Badminton Court, Multi-Purpose Game Court, Box Cricket/Cricket Practice Net, and Skating Rink.

title: Movie Theatres
document: Two Club Class Movie Theatres available within the campus for private screenings.

title: Banquet Hall
document: Spacious Banquet Hall for 200+ guests, Pre-Function Space, and Outdoor Banquet Space for 100 guests.

title: Children Zones
document: Outdoor Play Area, Indoor Toddler Play Area, Activity/Workshop Zone, Art & Craft Area, and Jhula Park in both blocks.

title: Library & Co-working
document: Library, Indoor-Outdoor Reading Area, Conference Space, and Co-working/Work from Home Studio.

title: Landscape Features
document: Lilly Pond & Sitting Island, Floating Decks, Rainforest Inspired Sitting Area, and 13,000 sq. ft. Lawn & Garba Ground.

title: Temple & Senior Zone
document: Iconic Temple surrounded by nature. Dedicated Senior Zones and multiple sit-out areas for elderly comfort.

title: Security Systems
document: Comprehensive CCTV surveillance, Access Control in private elevators, dedicated security cabin, and community gate.

title: Fire Safety
document: Advanced fire safety features per GDCR regulations, Fire Control Room, and two wide concrete staircases per block for emergency exits.

title: Barrier-Free Campus
document: Wheelchair friendly with specially abled washroom at first floor and reserved parking with ramp near lift.

title: Solar & LED
document: Rooftop solar system for common area lighting and LED installations throughout the campus for energy efficiency.

title: Water Management
document: Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) with dual plumbing for wastewater reuse, Rainwater Harvesting, and Greywater recycling.

title: Eco-Landscaping
document: Native, drought-resistant landscaping with efficient drip irrigation to conserve water.

title: Structural Integrity
document: Earthquake resistance RCC frame structure with block masonry. High-grade construction standards.

title: Flooring & Walls
document: Living/Kitchen: 4x6 Large Vitrified Slabs. Bedrooms: 2.5x5 Vitrified Tiles. Internal Walls: POP punning with premier coat.

title: Bathroom Fittings
document: Premium TOTO / Grohe CP fittings and sanitary ware. Designer dado tiles up to 8 ft height. Anti-skid flooring in wet areas.

title: Windows & Doors
document: Bedrooms: Powder-coated aluminum with DGU (Double Glazed Unit) glass. Main Door: 8 ft Veneer Clad Flush Door with brass hinges.

title: Electrical & Plumbing
document: 3-phase concealed conduit with ISI brand copper wiring and ELCB. Hydro-pneumatic water supply with PVR for uniform pressure.

title: Parking Allocation
document: 3 allotted parking bays per residential unit. Ample covered visitor parking. Mechanical parking level on ground floor.

title: EV Charging
document: One Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging Point provision for each unit at the ground floor.

title: Driveway Width
document: Unobstructed 8.0 meters wide driveways. 7.5 meter wide entry ramp. Minimum 15 feet wide roads in parking areas.

title: Lift Count
document: Total 12 elevators (6 per block). 4 private access-controlled passenger lifts and 2 service lifts with stretcher provisions per block.

title: Possession Date
document: The expected possession and handover date for the flats is December 2029.

title: Pricing
document: For pricing details of 4 BHK and 5 BHK flats, please contact the developer directly or visit the site.

title: RERA Number
document: Contact the developer directly or visit their site for the specific RERA registration number.
